calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Dec-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne in Propria Persona.

The Court raised the issue of whether the Trust can be terminated because of capital gains/large tax liabilities stating that it needs consent in writing from the Beneficiary and something indicating that the Beneficiary was advised by independent Counsel, and that it needs numbers as to the amount of the tax liabilities. Mr. Byrne stated that he can make an estimate, that the tax forms are not out yet and that he will have to employ a tax preparer. Mr. Byrne also spoke of issuing a K-1 and having the Beneficiary be responsible for the tax liability. The Fourth Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to December 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
